feedback.text: Hi, as an eu citizen who believes this initiative will be helpful with DIgital Protection. I kindly advise to including protection so that consumers who buy videogames have the access to keep them and arent locked away when the videogame publishers stop supporting the game, citizens who buy a videogame have the right to keep it even if the publisher no longer can maintain supporting it, Publishers should ensure a game is playable even if in a worse state so that anyone who bought it didnt waste money on the product, Thank you and Good luck to the Initiative.
